def positive_bytes_text_bytes_roundtrip_without_transformation():
    rule_id = "bytes_text_bytes_roundtrip_without_transformation"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag code that decodes and re-encodes data without changing it."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
